hero.title: Optimal Security Guard Management Solution
hero.description: Optimize scheduling, shift monitoring, and comprehensive security management for businesses. Operate professionally and cost-effectively with real-time data.

landing.audience_desc: SGCMP smoothly connects three key entities in professional security operations, creating a transparent, real-time, and efficient operating ecosystem.
landing.company_card_desc: Centrally manage personnel records, optimize smart shift scheduling, and monitor overall attendance and performance intuitively from a single platform.
landing.customer_card_desc: Track service quality in real time, proactively review online reports, submit emergency requests, and receive instant incident reports.
landing.guard_card_desc: A convenient mobile app that enables GPS-based check-ins, flexible shift acceptance, digital log keeping, and on-site photo submissions.
landing.features_desc: Elegantly designed and synchronized to completely resolve practical challenges in modern security management and operations.
landing.feat1_desc: An intuitive drag-and-drop interface helps administrators allocate shifts quickly. Automatic alerts for schedule conflicts and understaffed posts optimize human resources.
landing.feat2_desc: Accurate attendance tracking with GPS coordinates combined with on-site photo verification entirely prevents time theft.
landing.feat3_desc: Send real-time photos, attach on-site video clips, and add notes to coordinators if any issues arise for the client.
landing.feat4_desc: The dashboard automates the generation of detailed charts by project, guarded objective, or individual staff completion quality rankings.
landing.pricing_desc: Choose the solution package that best fits your needs, and easily upgrade as your business expands.

co_ban.name: Basic
co_ban.desc: Perfect for small organizations managing fewer than 20 personnel.

chuyen_nghiep.name: Professional
chuyen_nghiep.desc: A comprehensive security operations solution for mid-sized companies.
chuyen_nghiep.f1: All features in the Basic plan

doanh_nghiep.name: Enterprise
doanh_nghiep.desc: Deep customization capabilities and specialized infrastructure for large-scale operations.
doanh_nghiep.f2: API integration with internal ERP systems
